clusters.justification: These terms share co-activation within the salience and broader limbic networks, representing the macroscopic functional axis of emotional reactivity, interoceptive processing, and autonomic arousal.

These terms map onto the mesolimbic dopamine and ventral striatal circuitries, reflecting the overarching cognitive domain of computing subjective worth to guide motivation, reinforcement, and choice.

These terms robustly engage the default mode network, unifying internally-directed thought processes required for self-referential representations, autobiographical memory projection, and navigating interpersonal constructs.
